ns0:entry.ns0:title: David-Crty/databasement
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/David-Crty/databasement
Language: php
Self-hosted database backup manager with a web UI. Schedule, backup, and restore MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, SQLite & Redis to S3, SFTP, or local storage. SSH Tunnel support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leantime/leantime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leantime/leantime
Language: php
Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MlgmXyysd/Xiaomi-HyperOS-BootLoader-Bypass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MlgmXyysd/Xiaomi-HyperOS-BootLoader-Bypass
Language: php
A PoC that exploits a vulnerability to bypass the Xiaomi HyperOS community restrictions of BootLoader unlocked account bindings.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TYPO3/typo3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TYPO3/typo3
Language: php
The TYPO3 Core - Enterprise Content Management System. Synchronized mirror of https://review.typo3.org/q/project:Packages/TYPO3.CMS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZoneMinder/zoneminder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZoneMinder/zoneminder
Language: php
ZoneMinder is a free, open source Closed-circuit television software application developed for Linux which supports IP, USB and Analog cameras.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: deployphp/deployer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/deployphp/deployer
Language: php
The PHP deployment tool with support for popular frameworks out of the box

ns0:entry.ns0:title: filamentphp/filament
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/filamentphp/filament
Language: php
A powerful open-source UI framework for Laravel • Build and ship apps & admin panels fast with Livewire

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firefly-iii/firefly-iii
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii
Language: php
Firefly III: a personal finances manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: invoiceninja/invoiceninja
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/invoiceninja/invoiceninja
Language: php
A source-available invoice, quote, project and time-tracking app built with Laravel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/boost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/boost
Language: php
Laravel-focused MCP server for augmenting your AI powered local development experience.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/framework
Language: php
Laravel is a web application framework with expressive, elegant syntax.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: monicahq/monica
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/monicahq/monica
Language: php
Personal CRM. Remember everything about your friends, family and business relationships.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/all-in-one
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/all-in-one
Language: php
📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/server
Language: php
☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openmediavault/openmediavault
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openmediavault/openmediavault
Language: php
openmediavault is the next generation network attached storage (NAS) solution based on Debian Linux. Thanks to the modular design of the framework it can be enhanced via plugins. openmediavault is primarily designed to be used in home environments or small home offices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opensourcepos/opensourcepos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opensourcepos/opensourcepos
Language: php
Open Source Point of Sale is a web based point of sale application written in PHP using CodeIgniter framework. It uses MySQL as the data back end and has a Bootstrap 3 based user interface. If you like this project, please give it a star! Doing so helps maintain Popular OSS status for the project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel
Language: php
Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.
